## Checklist

- [ ] Content **describes** the custom rather than prescribing it.
- [ ] Variation by community / faith / region is noted where relevant.
- [ ] Any hygiene note explains the risk **and** a respectful, safer alternative.
- [ ] Frontmatter is filled in (`title`, `summary`, `order`, `lastUpdated`).
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally.
